description_long: This helmet features a robust, angular design with a military aesthetic, predominantly finished in matte olive green with subtle weathering and scuff marks. The front is dominated by a large, amber-tinted full-face visor that offers wide visibility and protection. The sides display reinforced cheek and jaw guards, with visible mechanical detailing and layered armor plating. The rear of the helmet is rounded and reinforced, featuring a central circular component and two small vent-like structures. Subtle black and metallic accents highlight the helmet's edges and functional joints, suggesting advanced construction. The overall form is compact and ergonomic, designed to fully enclose and protect the wearer's head in demanding environments.
description: A matte olive green, full-face helmet with an amber visor, reinforced jaw guards, and subtle black and metallic detailing. The design is robust, angular, and military-inspired.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large amber visor, angular brow, and reinforced jawline.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the layered armor, cheek guard, and side vent detail.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the rounded back, central circular component, and two small vents.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cheek guard and side vent detail.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Two small rectangular vents on the rear, one vent-like detail on each side above the ear area; no large or open vents visible.
